skipped.reason: Already has human review activity (illume reviewed)

style_guide: Commit subject format: area: SubArea: Description — description starts with capital letter
Do NOT include auto-close keywords in commit messages
Approval style is warm and brief; maintainer @illume enforces commit guidelines before APPROVE
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs — not human review
Frontend (TypeScript/React): fix exhaustive-deps violations, MUI v5 patterns
Backend (Go): comma-ok assertions, slog structured logging, test-first style
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic
CNCF CLA is a hard merge blocker
k8s-ci-robot posts bot IssueComments — not human review activity
